title: Oru Koottu Kiliyaga Lyrics Padikathavan
stanzas:
Oru koottuk kiliyaaga
oru thoppuk kuyilaaga
paadu pan paadu

irai thaeda parandhaalum
dhisai maari thirindhaalum
koodu oru koodu.

Oru koottuk kiliyaaga
oru thoppuk kuyilaaga
paadu pan paadu

irai thaeda parandhaalum
dhisai maari thirindhaalum
koodu .. oru koodu.

[Sellum vazhi engengum
pallam varalaam.
ullam edhir paaraamal
vellam varalaam.

nermai adhu maaraamal
dharmam adhai meeraamal
naalum nadai podungal
niyanam peralaam. ] (2)

sathiyathai nee kaathirunthaal
sathiyam ungalai kaathirukkum
thaai thandha anbukkum
naan thandha panbukkum
poomaalai kaathirukkum.

Oru koottuk kiliyaaga
oru thoppuk kuyilaaga
paadu pan paadu

irai thaeda parandhaalum
dhisai maari thirindhaalum
koodu oru koodu.

[Nellin vidhai podaamal
nellum varumaa
vervai adhu sindhaamal
vellip panamaa

vellai ilam chittukkal
vettri kodi kattungal
sorgam adhai thattungal
vinnai thodungal.](2)

aanandha kanneeril
abishegam naan seidhen
en kannil eeram illai.

Oru koottuk kiliyaaga
oru thoppuk kuyilaaga
paadu pan paadu

irai thaeda parandhaalum
dhisai maari thirindhaalum
koodu oru koodu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of friendship and joy, celebrating the bond between individuals.

What is the plot context of the movie Padikathavan?

The movie revolves around the life of a young man who faces various challenges while pursuing his dreams.

Who is the singer of Oru Koottu Kiliyaga?

The song is sung by Malaysia Vasudevan, known for his unique voice and style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oru Koottu Kiliyaga was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 11, 1985.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Koottu Kiliyaga, the vibrant melodies and lively lyrics reflect the joyous spirit of friendship. This song plays a significant role in Padikathavan, enhancing the narrative with its uplifting tone. The heartfelt expressions evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a beloved classic among fans. The collaboration of Malaysia Vasudevan's vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's music creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Koottu Kiliyaga from the Padikathavan movie is a timeless melody that captures the essence of camaraderie and joy. With Malaysia Vasudevan's soulful voice and Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition, this song takes listeners on a nostalgic journey. Experience the vibrant energy and heartfelt lyrics that make this classic a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Like a group of birds, like a bird from a garden, sing and sing.
Even if you search for the sky, and change directions, it’s still one nest.
What do you need? Listen to your brother.
Like a group of birds, like a bird from a garden, sing and sing.
Even if you search for the sky, and change directions, it’s still one nest.
We can find a way everywhere. Without looking at the heart, we can find a way.
Truth should not change, and righteousness should not change; let it walk on the right path every day.
If you wait for the truth, the truth will wait for you; the love given by your mother and the wealth I give will bloom like a flower.
Like a group of birds, like a bird from a garden, sing and sing.
Even if you search for the sky, and change directions, it’s still one nest.
Without planting the seed of paddy, will the paddy come? Without thinking, will it grow?
Let the white little flowers bloom, let them reach heaven, and let them touch the sky.
Life is not just about living. There is no life in the village without respect.
I have done anointing in joyful tears; there is no moisture in my eyes.
Like a group of birds, like a bird from a garden, sing and sing.
Even if you search for the sky, and change directions, it’s still one nest.
